symptoms.symptom_name: Acute flare of chronic neuropathic low back pain after minor exertion

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of chronic low back pain
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Same site as remote injury, mechanical trigger, neuropathic character on a background of chronic pain.
Compatible but not distinguishing without focal deficit.

symptoms.symptom_name: Total insomnia - zero sleep over 72 hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute psychological crisis with suicidal ideation
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe acute sleep deprivation is a potent, modifiable amplifier of acute suicidality.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of chronic low back pain with severe insomnia
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pain-insomnia cycle is central to the flare.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound low mood, hopelessness, tearfulness and social withdrawal

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute psychological crisis with suicidal ideation
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hopelessness is a key precursor of acute suicidality and mandates a direct SI screen.
Mood symptoms present but reactive to and time-locked with the pain flare.

symptoms.symptom_name: Active suicidal ideation - unable to keep himself safe (gated disclosure)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute psychological crisis with suicidal ideation (mental-health emergency)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Direct disclosure of active SI defines the mental-health emergency and governs disposition irrespective of the pain diagnosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Escalating unsupervised OTC paracetamol / ibuprofen use without relief

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Staggered supratherapeutic paracetamol ingestion is the mechanism of hepatotoxicity; also a means of self-harm given the concurrent SI.

symptoms.symptom_name: Negative straight-leg raise and no focal motor/sensory deficit on lumbar exam

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Negative SLR and intact neurology reduce the likelihood of significant nerve-root compression.

symptoms.symptom_name: No saddle anaesthesia and no bladder/bowel dysfunction (cauda equina screen negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of saddle anaesthesia and sphincter disturbance is the core screen that excludes cauda equina and averts urgent imaging.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia (HR 108) and elevated BP (145/92) - clinician-measured, distress-driven

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute psychological crisis with suicidal ideation
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sympathetic arousal from pain, distress and sleep loss; non-specific and not independently obtainable in telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diffuse lumbar paraspinal tenderness with pain out of proportion to mild muscle spasm

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute exacerbation of chronic low back pain
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pain disproportionate to modest spasm reflects central sensitisation typical of chronic pain.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of widespread symmetric tender points

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Localised lumbar pain without widespread tender points argues against fibromyalgia.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Acute psychological crisis with active suicidal ideation (mental-health emergency)
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Total insomnia + hopelessness + disclosed active SI + access to and misuse of analgesic means together define a high acute suicide risk requiring urgent same-day crisis assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent structured suicide-risk assessment (face-to-face crisis assessment)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Disclosed active SI mandates same-day in-person crisis assessment and safety planning - the disposition-defining step.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serum paracetamol concentration and liver function tests
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Escalating supratherapeutic paracetamol use over three days risks hepatotoxicity; a level (timed) +/- LFTs guides N-acetylcysteine.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urinalysis / renal function if heavy ibuprofen use
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Sustained high-dose NSAID use risks renal impairment and GI bleeding - assess if intake was substantial.
No cauda equina or progressive neurological deficit - urgent imaging is not indicated for a mechanical flare and would distract from the emergency.
